calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Bromley, via ZOOM, for Henrietta Currier, Petitioner.

The court refers to the proceedings from previous calling of this matter and advises counsel that the subsequent filings have not changed the court's position to deny the petition and allows counsel to provide additional advocacy. Counsel provides brief oral advocacy.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is denied.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody (via ZOOM). Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Continued To Jan-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Bromley; via ZOOM, for Henrietta Currier, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it is having trouble finding basis for granting the petition and advises counsel that he will need to provide the court with additional information before the court will reconsider his petition. The court asks counsel if the matter should be denied today or if he wants a continuance. Counsel requests a continuance. The court advises counsel that the settlor's sister has not been personally served. Counsel reports that he has a waiver of notice from the sister which he intends to file.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to Jan-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
